coverage: 100% of all reachable node types across 9 groups and 250 nodes.
validation: The authored case matches Blender's 71,755 / 71,104 topology and four-decimal local bounds exactly after running all 1,111 authored Blur Attribute iterations. A second line-thickness case also matches Blender's four-decimal bounds and every face, with one fewer browser vertex. Authored browser evaluation takes about 16 seconds.
